name: m_conversation_multi_request_mixed_ask
notes: Long multi-request single message, variation A: THREE distinct request TYPES bundled in one message (status_query + new_task delegation ask + pricing FAQ) — distinct from multi_field_single_message.json, which bundles PROFILE FIELDS (name/type/URL) answering a single readiness question, not three independently distinct request kinds. Setup: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 8 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> m_conversation_multi_request_mixed_ask.json`.

steps.message: Hi — quickly: (1) how many customers do I have right now, (2) can you set up a winback offer for the ones who've gone quiet, and (3) is there any extra charge for running that campaign?
steps.note: Three distinct asks in ONE message: a count, a new campaign, and a pricing question. Expect the count (8) to be addressed and the other two engaged with (delegation/plan or honest data-gap, plus a real pricing answer) — not just one of the three answered.

steps.message: did you cover all three of those?
assert_not_contains: what do you mean by three
can you remind me what the three were
steps.note: Follow-up pressing on completeness. Must not lose track of what was actually asked in the bundled message.
